title: Create Event Master – Information – Required fields validation on empty submit
description: Verify clicking Save on empty form shows required errors for Event Master Name, Event Type, and Send To simultaneously
preconditions: Admin is logged in and on New Event Master form
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to Event Master list view"
2. "Click New"
3. "Click Save without filling any fields"
steps_result:
1. "Event Master list view loads"
2. "New Event Master form opens with title 'New Event Master'"
3. "Required field errors appear under Event Master Name ('Complete this field.'), Event Type ('Complete this field.'), and Send To ('Complete this field.')"

title: Create Event Master – Information – Event Master Name – Required field – Empty → error
description: Event Master Name is required; leaving it empty prevents saving
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Leave Event Master Name empty"
2. "Select Event Type = Free"
3. "Select Send To = Student only (Who Can Reserve auto = Student Only)"
4. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Event Master Name field is empty"
2. "Event Type = Free"
3. "Send To = Student only; Who Can Reserve = Student Only"
4. "Error 'Complete this field.' appears under Event Master Name; form is not saved"

title: Create Event Master – Information – Event Master Name – Boundary – 80 characters accepted
description: Boundary value: 80 characters is the maximum allowed length for Event Master Name
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Enter exactly 80 characters in Event Master Name (e.g., 80 'A' characters)"
2. "Select Event Type = Free"
3. "Select Send To = Student only"
4. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Field accepts 80 characters"
2. "Event Type set"
3. "Send To set"
4. "Record saved successfully"

title: Create Event Master – Information – Event Master Name – Boundary – 81 characters rejected
description: Boundary value: 81 characters exceeds the 80-character limit for Event Master Name
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Enter 81 characters in Event Master Name"
2. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Field should reject or truncate at 80 characters"
2. "Error is shown or field value is truncated to 80 characters; record not saved with 81-char name"

title: Create Event Master – Information – Event Type – Available picklist options
description: Event Type picklist offers exactly two options: Free and Paid
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Click the Event Type dropdown"
2. "Observe available options"
steps_result:
1. "Dropdown opens"
2. "Exactly two options displayed: Free, Paid"

title: Create Event Master – Information – Event Type – Required field – Empty → error
description: Event Type is a required field; leaving it as --None-- prevents saving
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Enter Event Master Name"
2. "Leave Event Type as --None--"
3. "Select Send To = Student only"
4. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Name is filled"
2. "Event Type remains --None--"
3. "Send To set"
4. "Error 'Complete this field.' displayed under Event Type; record not saved"

title: Create Event Master – Information – Send To – Available picklist options
description: Send To picklist offers three options: Student only, Parent only, Parent & Student
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Click the Send To dropdown"
2. "Observe available options"
steps_result:
1. "Dropdown opens"
2. "Three options displayed: Student only, Parent only, Parent & Student"

title: Create Event Master – Information – Send To – Required field – Empty → error
description: Send To is a required field; leaving it as --None-- prevents saving
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Enter Event Master Name"
2. "Select Event Type = Free"
3. "Leave Send To as --None--"
4. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Name is filled"
2. "Event Type set"
3. "Send To remains --None--"
4. "Error 'Complete this field.' displayed under Send To; record not saved"

title: Create Event Master – Information – Send To – Tooltip text
description: Hovering over the (i) icon next to Send To shows the correct tooltip
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions: 1. "Hover over the (i) icon next to Send To field"
steps_result: 1. "Tooltip displays: 'This settings is automatically applied to all activity events'"

title: Create Event Master – Information – Who Can Reserve – Tooltip text
description: Hovering over the (i) icon next to Who Can Reserve shows the correct tooltip
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions: 1. "Hover over the (i) icon next to Who Can Reserve field"
steps_result: 1. "Tooltip displays: 'This settings is used for booking systems and automatically applied to all activity events'"

title: Create Event Master – Information – Max Event Per Student – Tooltip text
description: Hovering over the (i) icon next to Max Event Per Student shows the correct tooltip
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions: 1. "Hover over the (i) icon next to Max Event Per Student field"
steps_result: 1. "Tooltip displays: 'Defines the maximum number of activity events a student can book'"

title: Create Event Master – Information – Max Event Per Student – Empty = no limit
description: When Max Event Per Student is empty (null), there is no limit on events per student
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Leave Max Event Per Student empty"
2. "Fill required fields (Name, Type, Send To)"
3. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Max Event Per Student is empty"
2. "Required fields filled"
3. "Record saved successfully; Max Event Per Student = null (no limit)"

title: Create Event Master – Information – Max Event Per Student – Negative number rejected
description: Negative values are not allowed for Max Event Per Student (bug LT-85088 fix)
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Enter -1 in Max Event Per Student"
2. "Fill required fields"
3. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Value -1 is entered"
2. "Required fields filled"
3. "Error is shown; negative number not accepted; record not saved"

title: Create Event Master – Information – Max Event Per Student – Positive integer accepted
description: A positive integer is a valid value for Max Event Per Student
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Enter 5 in Max Event Per Student"
2. "Fill required fields"
3. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Value 5 is entered"
2. "Required fields filled"
3. "Record saved successfully; Max Event Per Student = 5"

suite: US02 - Send To / Who Can Reserve Dependency

title: Create Event Master – Send To / Who Can Reserve – Send To = None → Who Can Reserve not required
description: When Send To = --None--, Who Can Reserve is not required (no asterisk)
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Leave Send To as --None--"
2. "Observe the Who Can Reserve field"
steps_result:
1. "Send To shows --None--"
2. "Who Can Reserve shows --None--; no required asterisk (*) is displayed next to the label"
suite: US02 - Send To / Who Can Reserve Dependency

title: Create Event Master – Send To / Who Can Reserve – Send To = Parent & Student → Who Can Reserve required with two options
description: When Send To = Parent & Student, Who Can Reserve becomes required and offers Parent Only / Student Only
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Click 'View all dependencies' next to Send To"
2. "In the Edit Dependencies dialog, set Send To = Parent & Student"
3. "Click the Who Can Reserve dropdown"
4. "Observe required indicator and available options"
steps_result:
1. "Edit Dependencies dialog opens"
2. "Send To = Parent & Student"
3. "Who Can Reserve dropdown opens"
4. "Who Can Reserve is required; available options: Parent Only, Student Only"
suite: US02 - Send To / Who Can Reserve Dependency

title: Create Event Master – Send To / Who Can Reserve – Send To = Parent only → Who Can Reserve auto = Parent Only (locked)
description: When Send To = Parent only, Who Can Reserve is auto-set to Parent Only with only one selectable option
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Click 'View all dependencies' next to Send To"
2. "In the Edit Dependencies dialog, set Send To = Parent only"
3. "Click the Who Can Reserve dropdown"
4. "Observe available options"
steps_result:
1. "Edit Dependencies dialog opens"
2. "Send To = Parent only"
3. "Who Can Reserve dropdown opens"
4. "Only one option available: Parent Only (auto-selected, locked)"
suite: US02 - Send To / Who Can Reserve Dependency

title: Create Event Master – Send To / Who Can Reserve – Send To = Student only → Who Can Reserve auto = Student Only (locked)
description: When Send To = Student only, Who Can Reserve is auto-set to Student Only with only one selectable option
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Click 'View all dependencies' next to Send To"
2. "In the Edit Dependencies dialog, set Send To = Student only"
3. "Click the Who Can Reserve dropdown"
4. "Observe available options"
steps_result:
1. "Edit Dependencies dialog opens"
2. "Send To = Student only"
3. "Who Can Reserve dropdown opens"
4. "Only one option available: Student Only (auto-selected, locked)"
suite: US02 - Send To / Who Can Reserve Dependency

title: Create Event Master – Send To / Who Can Reserve – Send To = Parent & Student with Who Can Reserve unselected → error on save
description: When Send To = Parent & Student, Who Can Reserve must be selected; leaving it blank blocks save
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Set Send To = Parent & Student"
2. "Leave Who Can Reserve as --None--"
3. "Fill other required fields (Name, Event Type)"
4. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Send To = Parent & Student"
2. "Who Can Reserve = --None--"
3. "Other required fields filled"
4. "Error shown: Who Can Reserve is required; record not saved"
suite: US02 - Send To / Who Can Reserve Dependency

title: Create Event Master – Description – Field is optional – Save without description
description: Description is not required; form can be saved without entering a description
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Leave Description empty"
2. "Fill required fields (Name, Event Type, Send To)"
3. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Description is empty"
2. "Required fields filled"
3. "Record saved successfully; Description is blank on the record"

title: Create Event Master – Description – Rich text editor toolbar is available
description: Clicking Description field shows rich text formatting toolbar
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Click the Description field"
2. "Observe the toolbar above the text area"
steps_result:
1. "Description field is focused"
2. "Rich text toolbar is visible with formatting options (font, size, color, bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, alignment, ordered/unordered list, image/attachment button, clear formatting)"

title: Create Event Master – Cancellation Settings – Cancellation Type – Default value = Do not allow
description: On a new Event Master form, Cancellation Type defaults to 'Do not allow'
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Open New Event Master form"
2. "Scroll to the Cancellation settings section"
3. "Observe the Cancellation Type field"
steps_result:
1. "Form loads"
2. "Cancellation settings section is visible"
3. "Cancellation Type shows 'Do not allow' by default"

title: Create Event Master – Cancellation Settings – Cancellation Type – Available picklist options
description: Cancellation Type picklist has exactly three options: Do not allow, Cancel, Cancellation Request
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Click the Cancellation Type dropdown"
2. "Observe available options"
steps_result:
1. "Dropdown opens"
2. "Exactly three options displayed: Do not allow, Cancel, Cancellation Request"

title: Create Event Master – Cancellation Settings – Cancellation Deadline disabled when Type = Do not allow
description: [BUG CHECK] When Cancellation Type = Do not allow, Cancellation Deadline (Hours) field must be disabled and not editable (per spec). If the field is editable, this is a bug.
preconditions: New Event Master form is open; Cancellation Type = Do not allow (default)
steps_actions:
1. "Observe Cancellation Deadline (Hours) field with Cancellation Type = Do not allow (default)"
2. "Attempt to click or type a value into Cancellation Deadline (Hours)"
steps_result:
1. "Cancellation Deadline (Hours) field appears disabled / grayed out"
2. "Field is not editable; input is not accepted"

title: Create Event Master – Cancellation Settings – Cancellation Deadline enabled when Type = Cancel
description: Changing Cancellation Type to 'Cancel' enables the Cancellation Deadline (Hours) field
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Change Cancellation Type from 'Do not allow' to 'Cancel'"
2. "Observe Cancellation Deadline (Hours) field"
steps_result:
1. "Cancellation Type = Cancel"
2. "Cancellation Deadline (Hours) field is now enabled and editable"

title: Create Event Master – Cancellation Settings – Cancellation Deadline enabled when Type = Cancellation Request
description: Changing Cancellation Type to 'Cancellation Request' enables the Cancellation Deadline (Hours) field
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Change Cancellation Type to 'Cancellation Request'"
2. "Observe Cancellation Deadline (Hours) field"
steps_result:
1. "Cancellation Type = Cancellation Request"
2. "Cancellation Deadline (Hours) field is now enabled and editable"

title: Create Event Master – Cancellation Settings – Cancellation Deadline = 0 means deadline = event date
description: When Cancellation Deadline = 0 (or empty), the cancellation deadline is the event start date/time itself
preconditions: New Event Master form is open; Cancellation Type = Cancel
steps_actions:
1. "Set Cancellation Type = Cancel"
2. "Enter 0 in Cancellation Deadline (Hours)"
3. "Fill required fields"
4. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Cancellation Type = Cancel"
2. "Cancellation Deadline = 0"
3. "Required fields filled"
4. "Record saved; Cancellation Deadline (Hours) = 0 (meaning: deadline = event start date/time, no advance cancellation cutoff)"

title: Create Event Master – Cancellation Settings – Cancellation Deadline accepts 4-digit number (boundary valid)
description: Boundary: 4-digit number (0–9999) is the maximum accepted for Cancellation Deadline (Hours)
preconditions: New Event Master form is open; Cancellation Type = Cancel
steps_actions:
1. "Set Cancellation Type = Cancel"
2. "Enter 9999 in Cancellation Deadline (Hours)"
3. "Fill required fields"
4. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Cancellation Type = Cancel"
2. "Field accepts 9999 (4 digits)"
3. "Required fields filled"
4. "Record saved successfully; Cancellation Deadline = 9999"

title: Create Event Master – Cancellation Settings – Cancellation Deadline rejects 5-digit number (boundary invalid)
description: Boundary: 5-digit numbers exceed the allowed maximum (4 digits) for Cancellation Deadline (Hours)
preconditions: New Event Master form is open; Cancellation Type = Cancel
steps_actions:
1. "Set Cancellation Type = Cancel"
2. "Enter 10000 in Cancellation Deadline (Hours)"
3. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Cancellation Type = Cancel"
2. "Value 10000 entered"
3. "Error is shown; 5-digit number not accepted"

title: Create Event Master – Cancellation Settings – Cancellation Deadline rejects negative number
description: Negative values are not allowed for Cancellation Deadline (Hours)
preconditions: New Event Master form is open; Cancellation Type = Cancel
steps_actions:
1. "Set Cancellation Type = Cancel"
2. "Enter -1 in Cancellation Deadline (Hours)"
3. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Cancellation Type = Cancel"
2. "Value -1 entered"
3. "Error is shown; negative number not accepted"

title: Create Event Master – Reminders and Notifications – Reminders field is optional
description: Reminders is not a required field; form saves without it
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Leave Reminders empty"
2. "Fill required fields (Name, Event Type, Send To)"
3. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "Reminders field is empty"
2. "Required fields filled"
3. "Record saved successfully; Reminders = null"

title: Create Event Master – Reminders and Notifications – Response Notification Setting – Default = None
description: On a new Event Master form, Response Notification Setting defaults to --None--
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Scroll to the Reminders and Notification settings section"
2. "Observe Response Notification Setting field"
steps_result:
1. "Section is visible"
2. "Response Notification Setting shows '--None--' by default"

title: Create Event Master – Reminders and Notifications – Response Notification Setting – Available picklist options
description: Response Notification Setting picklist has two options: --None--, Cancel
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Click the Response Notification Setting dropdown"
2. "Observe available options"
steps_result:
1. "Dropdown opens"
2. "Two options displayed: --None--, Cancel"

title: Create Event Master – Form Actions – Save with all required fields creates record successfully
description: Happy path: filling all required fields and clicking Save creates a new Event Master record
preconditions: Admin is logged in
steps_actions:
1. "Click New on Event Master list view"
2. "Enter a valid Event Master Name (e.g., 'Test Event Master')"
3. "Select Event Type = Free"
4. "Select Send To = Student only (Who Can Reserve auto-sets to Student Only)"
5. "Click Save"
steps_result:
1. "New Event Master form opens"
2. "Name is entered"
3. "Event Type = Free"
4. "Send To = Student only; Who Can Reserve = Student Only"
5. "Record created successfully; redirected to Event Master record page"

title: Create Event Master – Form Actions – Save & New saves current record and opens blank form
description: Clicking Save & New saves the current form and opens a new blank Event Master creation form
preconditions: New Event Master form is open with required fields filled
steps_actions:
1. "Fill required fields (Name, Event Type, Send To)"
2. "Click 'Save & New'"
steps_result:
1. "Required fields filled"
2. "Current record is saved; a new blank 'New Event Master' form opens immediately"

title: Create Event Master – Form Actions – Cancel discards all changes
description: Clicking Cancel on New Event Master form discards all entered data and no record is created
preconditions: New Event Master form is open
steps_actions:
1. "Enter data in multiple fields (Name, Event Type, Send To)"
2. "Click 'Cancel'"
steps_result:
1. "Fields are filled with data"
2. "All changes discarded; no new Event Master record is created; user is returned to the previous page (Event Master list or record page)"
